name: Jaipur Kurta Elegant Sky Blue Embroidered Cotton Kurta Set
description: Step into timeless elegance with this beautifully crafted sky blue kurta set. Made from soft, breathable cotton, the kurta features delicate embroidery on the sleeves and front pockets, adding a touch of ethnic charm. The V-neckline is highlighted with subtle detailing, while the straight-cut silhouette ensures a flattering fit. Paired with matching straight pants and styled with statement jhumkas and white heels, this outfit is perfect for festive gatherings, casual outings, or office wear. Comfortable yet stylish, this ensemble is a must-have in every modern ethnic wardrobe.

name: Elegant Green Floral Kurta Set for Women
description: Step into effortless style with this charming green floral kurta set, perfect for casual outings, workwear, or daytime events. This three-piece ensemble features: Top: A calf-length kurta with a straight cut, mandarin collar, and side slits for ease of movement. The rich green base is beautifully adorned with vibrant floral prints in shades of red, yellow, and orange. Bottoms: Coordinated straight-fit trousers featuring the same floral print for a seamless, stylish look. Sleeves & Neckline: Elbow-length sleeves and a chic closed neckline with front button detailing enhance the modern ethnic ap

name: Brown Cotton Printed Anarkali with Attached Jacket Detailing with Pants and Dupatta
description: This elegant brown cotton Anarkali features intricate printed patterns and an attached jacket that adds a contemporary touch to traditional attire. Paired with matching pants and a coordinating dupatta, this ensemble offers both comfort and style, making it ideal for festive occasions or formal gatherings. The breathable cotton fabric ensures ease of wear, while the detailed jacket enhances the overall silhouette with sophistication.

name: Yellow Cotton Printed Anarkali with Attached Jacket Detailing with Pants and Dupatta
description: This yellow cotton printed Anarkali set features an attached jacket detail, paired with matching pants and a dupatta. Crafted from breathable cotton, it offers comfort and elegance for festive or casual occasions. The coordinated ensemble ensures a polished look with ease, blending traditional charm and contemporary style. Ideal for those seeking a refined yet comfortable ethnic outfit.

name: Elegant Brown Kurta Set with Printed Dupatta
description: Step into timeless elegance with this stunning brown kurta set, featuring intricate embroidery on the neckline and sleeves. Paired with a beautifully patterned black-and-white dupatta, this outfit is perfect for casual outings or festive gatherings. Style it with statement earrings and minimal makeup for a graceful, effortless look.
